title: Abyssal Sands: Fracture of Time
description: "Abyssal Sands: Fractures of Time" is a mod that adds three unique biomes, time-manipulating items, and a powerful boss. Explore the world, harness time, and conquer the Time Lord.
body:
# Abyssal Sands: Fractures of Time

**Abyssal Sands: Fractures of Time** is a mod that introduces three unique biomes, powerful time-manipulating items, and a challenging boss fight. Explore the mystical **Forgotten Sands**, eerie **Abyssal Abyss**, and serene **Celestial Grove**, each with their own distinctive blocks and resources. Harness the power of time with advanced tools, relics, and artifacts that let you manipulate the environment and defeat powerful enemies.

## Key Features:

### 1. Forgotten Sands:
- A golden desert biome with **Golden Sandstone** and **Sands of Time**, which are now used in crafting recipes.
- Small ruins scattered across the landscape.

### 2. Abyssal Abyss:
- A dark and mysterious biome full of **Abyssal Stones** and **Abyssal Water**.
- Geodes containing **Abyssal Crystals**.

### 3. Celestial Grove:
- A glowing forest filled with **Starlight Logs** and **Celestial Leaves**.
- **Glowblossom Flowers** and **Ethereal Dirt** add to the atmosphere.

## Items & Tools:

- **Lunar Clock of Abyssal Sands**:  
  Manipulate the environment with this rare clock, applying a **Bone Meal** effect to crops nearby.

- **Celestial Blade**:  
  A powerful sword that becomes stronger at night, crafted using **Celestial Shards** and **Starlight Logs**.

- **Abyssal Pickaxe**:  
  A fast and efficient pickaxe crafted with **Abyssal Crystals**.

## Time Lord Boss:

- **Time Lord**: A boss spawned by using the **Starlight Advancer** to shift the time. When the world time is divisible by 24000, the **Time Lord** will appear. Defeat the **Time Lord** for powerful drops like the **Time-Lord’s Belt**.

---

**Abyssal Sands: Fractures of Time** offers an immersive experience with unique biomes, time-manipulating items, and challenging new content. Dive into the world of time itself and explore, craft, and conquer the mysteries of the **Abyssal Sands**!
